'''''Star Wars Monthly'' 171''' is the one hundred seventy-first issue of the ''[[Star Wars Monthly]]'' series of comic reprint magazines, published in [[June]] [[1983]]. This would be the last issue of the series under the ''Star Wars Monthly'' title. ''[[Return of the Jedi Weekly]]'' followed this series, but no longer continued the previous numbering.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 71|''Star Wars'' (1977) 71]]
*"The Further Adventures of Indiana Jones"
*"Visual Data"
